sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if ACTION7 restarted the game
print(f"Last action result: {last_action_result}")
print(f"State: {last_action_result.get('state')}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")

# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print(f"\n=== Nodes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 100:
        print(f"  {n['color']} {n['pixels']}px (large)")
    else:
        print(f"  {n['color']} {n['pixels']}px boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check white bar
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
white_count = ascii_lines[63].count('W')
print(f"\nWhite bar count: {white_count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
